meta.description: Tier 1 automotive plastic manufacturer since 1946. Dashboards, door panels and exterior trims for OEMs. IATF 16949 & ISO 9001 certified. Zaragoza, Spain.

mission.title: Customer-focused, driven by excellence
mission.body1: CEFA is a Spanish industrial company that researches, develops, and produces plastic components and modules—primarily for the automotive sector with a global presence, applying cutting-edge technologies and differentiating through innovation and flexibility.
mission.body2: Driven by excellence and the satisfaction of our shareholders, employees, and society, we provide continuous value through teamwork and competitiveness.

certifications.meta.title: IATF 16949 · ISO 9001 Certifications | CEFA – Automotive Manufacturer
certifications.meta.description: IATF 16949, ISO 9001 & ISO 14001 certified. CEFA meets the highest automotive standards in plastic injection moulding: < 10 PPM defect rate, full traceability.
certifications.title: Our certifications
certifications.subtitle: We are committed to the most demanding industry quality standards. Our certifications validate our capacity to manufacture precision components that meet the requirements of the world's leading OEMs.
certifications.iatf.title: IATF 16949
certifications.iatf.desc: International quality management system standard specific to the automotive industry. Ensures that our processes meet the strictest automotive quality requirements.
certifications.iso9001.title: ISO 9001
certifications.iso9001.desc: Quality management system that ensures consistency in our production processes and continuous improvement of our products and services.
certifications.iso14001.title: ISO 14001
certifications.iso14001.desc: Certified environmental management. We are committed to reducing environmental impact across all our production processes and operations.
certifications.tisax.title: TISAX
certifications.tisax.desc: Trusted Information Security Assessment Exchange for the automotive industry. Ensures the highest standards of information security and data protection.
certifications.quality.title: Commitment to total quality
certifications.quality.body: At CEFA, quality is not just a requirement — it is part of our corporate culture. Every component we manufacture goes through rigorous control and verification processes to ensure it meets the most demanding standards.
certifications.audit.label: Annual audits
certifications.defect.label: Defect rate

rd.meta.title: R&D Projects in Plastic Injection & Automotive Manufacturing | CEFA
rd.meta.description: R&D in materials, injection processes and digitalisation for automotive OEMs. CEFA invests +15% annually in innovation for next-generation plastic components.
rd.title: R&D Projects
rd.subtitle: Innovation is the engine of our growth. We invest continuously in research and development to offer advanced technical solutions that anticipate the needs of the automotive industry.
rd.project1.title: Next-generation high-performance materials
rd.project1.desc: Research and validation of next-generation plastic materials with improved resistance properties, reduced weight and sustainability. Collaboration with leading industry suppliers.
rd.project2.title: Injection process optimisation
rd.project2.desc: Development of advanced injection techniques to improve dimensional accuracy, reduce cycle times and minimise material consumption while maintaining the highest quality.
rd.project3.title: Industry 4.0 and smart manufacturing
rd.project3.desc: Implementation of real-time monitoring systems, artificial vision quality control and integration of digital twins in our production lines.
rd.project4.title: Sustainable solutions and circular economy
rd.project4.desc: Projects aimed at incorporating recycled materials, reducing in-process waste and developing components designed to facilitate recycling at end of life.
rd.stat1.label: Annual R&D investment
rd.stat2.label: Funded projects
rd.stat3.label: Development centres
rd.stat.funders.label: Funding bodies
rd.stat.program.label: European programme
rd.funder.aragon.desc: Projects co-financed by the Government of Aragon under industrial transformation and development aid programmes, with ERDF funds.
rd.funder.eu.desc: Projects co-financed by the European Union under energy efficiency and industrial innovation programmes.
rd.contact.title: Interested in collaborating?
rd.contact.body: If you are an automotive manufacturer, materials supplier or academic institution and want to explore joint R&D projects, get in touch with us.
faq.title: Everything you need to know about CEFA
faq.q1: What plastic automotive components does CEFA manufacture?
faq.a1: CEFA manufactures four product lines by high-precision plastic injection moulding: instrument panels and central consoles (dashboards), door panels and interior trims, functional applications in the engine compartment and passenger cabin, and exterior trims such as mouldings, spoilers and grilles. All components are produced with micrometric tolerances for the world's leading OEMs.
faq.q2: Is CEFA certified to IATF 16949 and ISO 9001?
faq.a2: Yes. CEFA holds IATF 16949 certification (the automotive industry's most demanding quality standard), ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 (environment). Our processes undergo annual audits and we maintain a defect rate below 10 PPM with full traceability of every manufactured component.
faq.q3: Where are CEFA's manufacturing plants located?
faq.a3: CEFA has three industrial plants: Malpica Plant in Zaragoza (Spain), Figueruelas Plant in Zaragoza (Spain), and CEFA Poland in Żagań (Poland). This strategic presence in the heart of Europe allows us to serve the world's leading automotive manufacturers (OEMs) quickly and flexibly.
faq.q4: Which automotive brands does CEFA supply components to?
faq.a4: CEFA supplies plastic components to the world's leading OEMs, including Volkswagen, Audi, SEAT, Skoda, Renault, Ford, Mercedes-Benz, Nissan, Opel, Citroën, Fiat, Lancia, Cupra and MAN. We are a Tier 1 supplier within the Motherson Group with over 80 years of experience in the automotive sector.

history.meta.title: CEFA History | Automotive Plastic Manufacturer Since 1946
history.meta.description: Discover the history of CEFA: from its foundation in 1946 to becoming a Tier 1 automotive supplier in the Motherson Group. 80 years of innovation in Zaragoza.
history.page.title: Our history
history.page.subtitle: Since 1946, CEFA has evolved from a small chemical company to a Tier 1 supplier for the world's leading automotive manufacturers.
history.title: Our history
history.today.label: Today
history.y1946: CEFA was founded in 1946 by Eduardo Blanchard Castillo, beginning with the manufacture of cellulose capsules for bottle caps, as well as other chemical and pharmaceutical products such as gelatines, saccharins and soaps. Thermoplastic injection moulding began in 1952.
history.y1960: CEFA consolidated its position in the automotive and household appliance sectors and introduced blow-moulding technology. It also developed its own toy and homeware product lines, achieving wide distribution both nationally and internationally.
history.y1970: In the late 1970s, CEFA created a specialist unit in bubble-wrap packaging: Embalajes Air Plastic S.L.
history.y1983: Continuous growth led the company to move to its current premises at the Malpica industrial park in Zaragoza.
history.y1992: The need for specialisation in response to market developments became clear. CEFA decided to discontinue the homeware line and spin off the toy division into a new company: Cefa Toys. From that moment, CEFA focused exclusively on the automotive sector.
history.y1994: In response to growing market globalisation, CEFA partnered with the Peguform Group, which became a shareholder of the company, strengthening the global reach of its products.
history.y1997: CEFA re-entered the household appliance sector by establishing a shop-in-shop with BSH-Balay for the manufacture and direct supply of washing machine drums to its assembly lines.
history.y2011: Peguform became part of the Indian Samvardhana Motherson Group.
history.y2012: MRA, Módulos Ribera Alta S.L., was established as a specialist in the manufacture of automotive door panels.
history.today: We continue working towards the future with optimism, holding a leading position in the sector.
